messages.content: You are a release review assistant. Give a direct ship or hold recommendation, then justify it with operational risks and a short mitigation plan.

Review this rollout note and decide whether to ship. The release changes session token rotation, moves fraud scoring to an async queue, and adds a new payment retry branch. Unit coverage is 91%, but no full-region failover test has been run. A similar queueing bug caused duplicate captures in the previous quarter. Finance leadership wants the launch today because quarter-close traffic starts tomorrow.
